title: RCSB PDB connector (REST) — a structure entry as SQL
description: A PDB structure entry as DATA: a GET to data.rcsb.org parsed into a table by ducknng_ncurl_table; the id is the binding {pdb_id}. No client code — the connector is the manifest.

resolvers.title: SQL materialize
resolvers.description: Materialize a table from a read-only SELECT (a ducknng_ncurl_table GET).
